description_long: This SUV features a striking, angular design with a geometric, stainless steel body and a large, continuous glass canopy that extends from the windshield to the roof. The vehicle has a matte metallic gray finish, with sharp, faceted surfaces and minimal ornamentation, giving it a futuristic and industrial appearance. The side profile reveals large, rugged black wheels with deep treads, and the absence of visible door handles or trim enhances its sleek, monolithic look. The front end is flat and wide, with a single horizontal light bar running across the top, while the rear is similarly flat with a red light strip spanning the width. The bed of the SUV is covered, suggesting utility and cargo capacity, and the overall stance is tall and robust, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The design cues and proportions are reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck, emphasizing durability and modernity.
description: A futuristic, angular SUV with a matte metallic gray body, large black wheels, and a continuous glass canopy, resembling the Tesla Cybertruck.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat, wide nose with a single horizontal light bar and sharply angled windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the geometric, faceted body, large black wheels, and the continuous glass canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat tailgate with a red light strip and a covered cargo bed.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular body, large wheels, and extended glass roof.
attribute_wheel_design: large black wheels with deep, angular treads and a geometric, multi-faceted pattern
